_meta.authority: src/workers/lib/spine-authority.ts SPINE_ACTIONS (the const) + src/workers/lib/permissions.ts SpineAction / SpineDenyReason unions
_meta.note: CHECKED-IN PROJECTION, NOT the source of truth. The TypeScript SPINE_ACTIONS const IS the source of truth. This JSON exists so the frontend can gate spine controls against a single machine-readable vocabulary WITHOUT re-declaring an action table in the prototype (which would create a second source of truth and the exact drift the loop is meant to prevent). scripts/verify-spine-vocabulary.mjs FAILS if this file drifts from source, and also fails if the const and the type union disagree.

consumed_by.runtime: GET /api/v1/session -> entitlement.identity.spine_authority = { allowed_actions, disabled_reasons, enforced }; the FE gates each control on THIS envelope at runtime (see src/shared/platform/iam.ts isSpineActionAllowed/spineControlDisabled).
consumed_by.build_time: the Design prototype's migration overlay + any FE-side gate diffs its control->action mapping against this list so an unknown or renamed action fails CI, not production.

_meta.flag: ENTITLEMENT_ENFORCEMENT (default off => enforced:false, legacy canWrite(role) gate, byte-identical; 'on' => per-action canActOnSpine with server-read mode)
